name: portalvic
description: PORTALVIC — Supabase CLI runs from this repo via npx (no global install).

scripts.deploy:ghost: supabase functions deploy portal-admin-ghost-start --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy portal-admin-ghost-verify --no-verify-jwt
scripts.deploy:parent-portal: supabase functions deploy parent-portal-sign-in --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy parent-portal-home-load --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy parent-portal-participant-detail --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy parent-portal-general-info-save --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy portal-parent-form-submit --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb
scripts.deploy:sevitha-document-hub: supabase functions deploy portal-admin-hr-files-list --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy portal-admin-expenses-list --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy portal-admin-onboarding-documents-list --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb && supabase functions deploy portal-admin-hr-file-signed-url --no-verify-jwt --project-ref cklpnwhlqsulpmkipmqb
